name: Colorizer Service
description: Public agent on Base Sepolia testnet. Accepts a color image and returns a grayscale (black-and-white) version. Charges $0.01 USDC per conversion via x402 on Base Sepolia (EIP-3009 transferWithAuthorization). Input: base64-encoded JPEG / PNG / WebP / AVIF. Output: base64-encoded grayscale PNG.

services.name: A2A
services.description: Agent2Agent JSON-RPC endpoint (method: message/send). Payment-gated via x402: expects X-PAYMENT header with EIP-3009 signature on retry.

services.name: MCP
services.description: Model Context Protocol WebSocket endpoint. Exposes the `colorize` tool directly, no x402 required.

services.name: web
services.description: Human-readable index page for manual testing.

skills.name: Colorize (Grayscale)
skills.description: Converts a color image to black-and-white. Costs $0.01 USDC per call via x402 on Base Sepolia.
examples: Convert this image to black and white: https://example.com/photo.jpg
Make a grayscale version of my image
